zh.Constantinople, now, Istanbul, Turkey: دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,是Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev和Kristina Ingesdotter的女兒，於1102年出生在烏克蘭Київська область。她於1122年與Andronikos Komnenos結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1134年享年32歲，埋葬在白展丁 艾皮爾。

zh-hans.Constantinople, now, Istanbul, Turkey: دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,是Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev和Kristina Ingesdotter的女儿，于1102年出生在乌克兰Київська область。她于1122年与Andronikos Komnenos结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1134年享年32岁，埋葬在白展丁 艾皮爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rurik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian and Rusyn (standard transliteration Buryk): nickname derived from buryy ‘dark brown’.

Slovak (mainly Burík and Búrik) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Burík): nickname from the archaic Slovak name burík for a (dark) gray horse, or derived directly from an adjective meaning ‘(dark) gray’ (in Slovak) or ‘dark brown’ (in Rusyn; compare 1 above).
Czech (Buřík): variant of Buřič (see Buric 1). Compare Burick .

variants.name: Buric
meanings: Czech (Buřič) and Slovak (Burič): nickname from Czech buřič, Slovak burič ‘rebel’.

Serbian and Croatian (Burić): patronymic from Buro, which may be a short form of the old personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, from buriti se ‘to stir up’, + slav, from slava ‘glory’), or a nickname for a big-bellied man derived from the root of burav ‘bellied’.
Croatian (Burić): nickname derived from bura ‘north wind’ (see Bura 2) and given to a child born when this wind was blowing. Compare Burich and Burick .

variants.name: Burick
meanings: Americanized form of Ukrainian, Rusyn, and Slovak Burik or Czech Buřik.
Americanized form of Czech Buřič and Slovak Burič or Serbian and Croatian Burić (see Buric ).

nameMeanings.name: Irina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, was born in 1102, in Kyiv, Ukraine as the daughter of Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev and Kristina Ingesdotter. She married Andronikos Komnenos in 1122. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1134, at the age of 32, and was buried in Byzantine Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, est née en 1102, à Kyiv, Ukraine, fille de Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev et Kristina Ingesdotter. Elle a épousé Andronikos Komnenos en 1122. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1134, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Empire byzantin.

de.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, wurde 1102 in Kyiv, Ukraine, als Tochter von Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev und Kristina Ingesdotter geboren. Sie hat 1122 Andronikos Komnenos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1134 im Alter von 32 Jahren und wurde in Byzantinisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, è nata il nel 1102 nel Kyiv, Ucraina come figlia di Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev e Kristina Ingesdotter. Lei sposato Andronikos Komnenos nel 1122. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1134, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Impero bizantino.

ja.Constantinople, now, Istanbul, Turkey: オスマン帝国イスタンブルイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,は1102年にウクライナКиївська областьでMstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of KievとKristina Ingesdotterの娘として生まれた。1122年にAndronikos Komnenosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1134年に32歳で死去し，東ローマ帝国にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,(은)는 1102년 우크라이나 Київська область에서 Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev(와)과 Kristina Ingesdotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1122년 Andronikos Komnenos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1134년 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 비자틴 피르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, nasceu em 1102, em Kyiv, Ucrânia filha de Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev e Kristina Ingesdotter. Ela casou-se com Andronikos Komnenos em 1122. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1134, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Império Bizantino.

ru.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, родилась в 1102 г. в местности Киевская область, Украина. Её родителей звали Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev и Kristina Ingesdotter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andronikos Komnenos в 1122 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1134 г. в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности Византийская империя.

es.lifeSummary: Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, nació en 1102, en Kyiv, Ucrania como hija de Mstislav I Vladimirovich Grand Prince of Kiev y Kristina Ingesdotter. Se casó con Andronikos Komnenos en 1122. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1134, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Imperio bizantino.
